headline: California Says Amazon Engaged In Illegal Price-Fixing Scheme—Attorney General Says 'Evidence We've Uncovered Is Clear As Day'
summary: California officials on Monday said newly unsealed court filings show Amazon.com Inc. engaged in an illegal price-fixing scheme that allegedly pushed up prices across major retailers. Amazon Price Fixing Allegations Involving Major Retailers In a press release, California Attorney General Rob Bonta said the state has obtained unredacted court filings that allegedly show Amazon pressuring vendors and retailers to raise prices across competing platforms, including Walmart and Target. headline: Target drops viral influencer brand under $40 to attract customers
summary: Target keeps making major moves to win back customer trust. The company started 2026 by appointing longtime employee Michael Fiddelke as its new CEO. Fiddelke is leading a $5 billion "New Chapter" recovery plan focused on decluttering stores, curating products customers want most, and making ...

headline: Disney announces limited-time, nostalgic retail experiences
summary: Almost 40 years ago, Disney opened its first retail store in California’s Glendale Galleria shopping mall. Before that 1987 launch, the company’s only owned retail sites were in its various parks, but as its fan base grew, executives decided stand-alone shopping experiences were worth a shot. By ...

headline: Best Buy CEO reveals successor amid wave of transition announcements
summary: After Tim Cook announced plans to step down from Apple's (AAPL) chief executive role in September, Best Buy (BBY) CEO Corie Barry revealed her successor as she seeks to step down at the end of October. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into the latest round of CEO transitions and departures at major companies.

headline: California attorney general says Amazon used ‘intimidation’ to get competitors like Walmart and Target to fix prices
summary: Emails suggest the retail giant pushed companies to ‘fix’ or ‘correct’ prices so they don’t undercut Amazon on eye drops, khakis, pet treats and more.

headline: 4 To Watch Of 21 'Safer' April Dividends From 100 Fortune Best Companies To Work For (FBCTWF)
summary: Analyzing the 54 dividend-paying Fortune Best Companies To Work For, 0 currently offer dividends from $1,000 invested exceeding their share price, limiting 'dogcatcher' value. Read more.

headline: Brightstar Capital Partners Invests in Bendon, a Provider of Screen-Free Children’s Activity Products
summary: NEW YORK & WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., April 22, 2026--Brightstar Capital Partners ("Brightstar"), a private equity firm focused on partnering with entrepreneurs and management teams, today announced its acquisition of Bendon Publishing International, Inc. ("Bendon" or "the Company"), a designer and distributor of licensed children’s coloring, activity, and educational products. headline: Alliance Entertainment: Higher Margins And A Low Float
